name: preference-memory-suite
description: Detachable project preference memory suite for isolated, auditable, resettable user preference caches.

interface.shortDescription: Project-isolated preference memory for PM workflows.
interface.longDescription: A detachable suite for managing project-level preference caches that are isolated by project, versioned in the repository, resettable, clearable, and governed by human approval.
defaultPrompt: Create a project preference cache for this product.
Record this user preference as a candidate memory.
Reset or clear the current project's preference cache.
